mapper.sql: USER_ID, USERNAME, PASSWORD_HASH, PHONE, EMAIL, AVATAR_ID, NICKNAME, GENDER, BIRTH_DATE, POINTS, PRIVACY_SETTINGS, IS_DELETED, DELETED_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT
mapper.select: SELECT FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_DELETED = 0
SELECT FROM USERS WHERE USERNAME = #{username} AND IS_DELETED = 0
SELECT FROM USERS WHERE PHONE = #{phone} AND IS_DELETED = 0
SELECT FROM USERS WHERE EMAIL = #{email} AND IS_DELETED = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USERS WHERE USERNAME = #{username} AND IS_DELETED = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USERS WHERE PHONE = #{phone} AND IS_DELETED = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USERS WHERE EMAIL = #{email} AND IS_DELETED = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USERS ( USER_ID, USERNAME, PASSWORD_HASH, PHONE, EMAIL, NICKNAME, GENDER, BIRTH_DATE, POINTS, PRIVACY_SETTINGS, IS_DELETED, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{nickname}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{points}, #{privacySettings}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS SET NICKNAME = #{nickname}, PHONE = #{phone}, EMAIL = #{email}, GENDER = #{gender}, BIRTH_DATE = #{birthDate}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_DELETED = 0
UPDATE USERS SET AVATAR_ID = #{avatarId}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_DELETED = 0
UPDATE USERS SET PASSWORD_HASH = #{passwordHash}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_DELETED = 0
UPDATE USERS SET PRIVACY_SETTINGS = #{privacySettings}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_DELETED = 0
